def load_user_data():
    with open("/home/admin/users.json", "r") as f:
        return json.load(f)

def backup_database():
    subprocess.run(["pg_dump", "-f", "/var/backups/db/latest.sql", "mydb"])

def read_config():
    with open("/etc/myapp/config.yaml", "r") as f:
        return yaml.safe_load(f)

def export_report(data):
    with open("/tmp/reports/quarterly.csv", "w") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(data)

def load_model():
    model = torch.load("/opt/models/classifier_v2.pt")
    return model
